title: Polish names screen and redesign summary screen with inline payer chips
acceptance_criteria: Names screen: card styling consistent with redesigned bill-item-card
Summary: card per participant with name and owed amount
Summary: inline horizontal scrollable chip selector at top for payer selection (no modal step)
Summary: payer card styled with muted opacity and '(You)' badge
Summary: total summary at top showing 'Total bill' and 'Your share'
Summary: 'Generate All Loans' bottom button only enabled when payer selected
